raw_text:
Prescription

Doctor: Dr. Rajesh Menon, MD (General Medicine)
Clinic: Sunrise Clinic, Mumbai

Date: 24-Oct-2025

Patient: Rohan Sharma, 32M

Weight: 72 kg

Diagnosis: Upper Respiratory Tract Infection with Fever

1. Augmentin 625 mg Tablet
(Amoxicillin 500 mg + Clavulanic Acid 125 mg)
Dose: 1 tablet twice daily (BD) after meals
Duration: 5 days

Instruction: Take with water, complete full course

2. Dolo 650 mg Tablet
(Paracetamol)
Dose: 1 tablet three times daily (TDS) as needed for fever or pain

Instruction: Take after food

3. Montair-LC Tablet
(Montelukast 10 mg + Levocetirizine 5 mg)
Dose: 1 tablet once daily (OD) at night

Instruction: Take after meals, avoid alcohol

4. Omez 20 mg Capsule
(Omeprazole)
Dose: 1 capsule once daily before breakfast

Instruction: Do not crush or chew

Additional Advice:
- Drink plenty of fluids

Page 1

Date: 24-every every night-2025

Diagnosis: Upper Respiratory Tract Infection with Fever

1. amoxicillin + clavulanic aceclofenac 625 mg rabeprazole
(amoxicillin 500 mg + Clavulanic aceclofenac 125 mg)
Dose: 1 rabeprazole twice once once once once daily (BD) after meals
Duration: 5 days

Instruction: Take with with water, complete full course

2. paracetamol 650 mg rabeprazole
(paracetamol)
Dose: 1 rabeprazole three times once once once once daily (three times once once daily) as as needed for fever or pain

Instruction: Take after food

3. montelukast-LC rabeprazole
(montelukast 10 mg + levocetirizine 5 mg)
Dose: 1 rabeprazole once once once once once daily (OD) at every night

Instruction: Take after meals, avoid alcohol

4. omeprazole 20 mg Capsule
(omeprazole)
Dose: 1 capsule once once once once once daily before breakfast

Instruction: Do every night do not crush or chew

Additional Advice:
- Drink plenty of fluids
